body: I think we want to include the surface cell in this. We _additionally_ want to adjust cells that contact sea ice at the surface.
title: Adjust below freezing temperatures at all cells including surface

body:
I am working on adding support for initialising and relaxing to WOA and EN4 datasets, to provide some flexibility in terms of the years and various configurations we can run on ClimaOcean. This PR covers such changes. 

cc @navidcy 

Edit by @navidcy 

This PR adds support for initialising temperature and salinity from the EN4 dataset. Support for restoring to EN4 FieldTimeSeries will come in a later PR.

Also, Pros & Cons of EN4: https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaOcean.jl/pull/467#issuecomment-2803560405

labels.description: We must feed the models so they don't get cranky
labels.name: data wrangling

title: Adding EN4 as an initialisation dataset + Refactor DataWrangling module
